display_name: Match exhaustiveness and ownership totality Phase A
notes: Value-producing matching is `@match`; bare `match` is statement-only. Exhaustiveness and ownership totality apply to enum/Option/Result/sealed families.

display_name: match arm !if adjacent negative guard law
notes: Current law: `!if` is an adjacent negative guard in match arm contexts; constructor delegation still admits only positive if.

display_name: Module API digest and separate compilation core
notes: The closed module API digest schema preserves normalized signatures, callable responsibility profiles, named-rest Record*** residue, error/effect/authority/isolation, conformance evidence identity, and ConstructionRow/ProjectionRow public commitments. canonical_sha256 excludes itself from the exact canonical UTF-8 byte projection; symbol_id uniqueness/order and kind-specific fields are sealed by positive/negative fixtures.
